Defines the ECMA Boolean built-in object with its properties and identifiers for JerryScript.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and constants related to the ECMAScript Boolean object. It uses preprocessor directives to define and later undefine macros such as `OBJECT_ID`, `OBJECT_VALUE`, `NUMBER_VALUE`, and `ROUTINE`. These macros are used to specify properties and characteristics of the Boolean object, such as its prototype and length. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the Boolean object, while `OBJECT_VALUE` and `NUMBER_VALUE` define specific properties like `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_PROTOTYPE` and `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_LENGTH` with fixed attributes. This file is part of a larger system that manages ECMAScript built-in objects and their properties.
